mapper.select: select t.nos, t.nb, t.salescode, t.outdate, c.paymoney as money, t.gxrq from u2sale t inner join u2salec c on t.nos = c.nos where 1=1 AND t.satypes NOT IN (17,18) AND t.chflags = '1' AND t.gxrq >= CONVERT ( DateTime, #{sDate} ) AND t.gxrq <= CONVERT ( DateTime, #{eDate} ) and c.paycode IN ( '01', '02', '03', '05', '08', '10', '12', '13', '07', '00', '17') and t.cusno = #{cusno}
